title: Magic Of Ultima
description: Adds various types of magic wands to your game!
body:
Welcome to Magic of Ultima, here you are able to explore and experiment with the various amount of new wands in the game. All of these items can be found in the Creative Tab "Wands"

- Wand of Haste, Increases your movement speed for 5 seconds
- Wand of Lightning, Summons a lightning bolt with a cooldown
- Wand of Summoning, Spawns either a Husk, Pillager, or Guardian, probably not the best to use for PVP, but is good for grinding certain items
- Wand of Fire, Any mob within a 10 block radius will be caught on fire and will have the slowness effect applied for about 15 seconds
- Wand of Slowness, the player will be slowed down, with the added benefit of extra protection
